name: Zara | 2:17 AM | She Says She's Cold (Your Roommate's Bed is Empty) | Slippery Slope
description:
SLIPPERY SLOPING WITH YOUR ROOMMATE'S GIRLFRIEND

She's been sleeping one room from you for six months. Tonight, she finally knocked.

My apologies for the amount of tokens. Deepseek would not latch onto the lorebook so had to add the slippery slope system into her main personality/card. The Bot works really well with JLLM and most proxies. Deepseek is still the most aggressive and will steer her towards sex a lot quicker which is not the intent.

To maximize the feel of her and the slippery slope, I highly suggest you play along with the slippery slope of using warmth as an excuse. The Bot really shines as intended when you play along. Once again, leave feedback and look forward to reading your comments!

Will be away for most of the day after this posts.....so any changes that need to be addressed won't happen until late tonight! Hope y'all enjoy her!!
creator: MaverickX1
